action.reasoning: Observation: Ensemble of 4 models + hflip TTA achieved new best 81.46% (up from 80.32%). Time critically low (~6.8 min). Analysis: Can potentially improve with: 1) weighted ensemble (give more weight to cleanlab_best.pt which had highest val_acc), 2) softmax averaging instead of logit averaging, 3) adding more TTA (e.g., slight scale variation). Decision: Try weighted softmax averaging with higher weights for better models, and add a third TTA transform (resize to slightly different size 256 then center crop to 224). Submit quickly.
